insertion_point: the boundary after frozen action scores and before action selection
proposed_role: remove actions that are invalid in the current scenario
host_input_semantics: ordered action scores paired with a shared action ontology
host_output_semantics: filtered scores over the unchanged action vocabulary
semantic_mapping: the module uses the same action identifiers and ordering as the baseline
adapter: a named action identifier join checks ontology coverage before filtering
predicted_effect: reduce intent violations caused by structurally invalid choices
failure_mode: an incomplete ontology may suppress a necessary action
normalization: reuse frozen baseline logits before categorical normalization
masks: binary scenario-valid action mask with explicit unknown-action rejection
ordering: preserve the baseline action ontology order
assumptions: every baseline action identifier resolves before masking
gradient_expectation: no gradient is introduced by the deterministic mask
parameter_update_scope: no trainable parameters; baseline remains frozen
loss_scale: not applicable because the module is non-trainable
baseline_parity_behavior: disabling enable_semantic_action_mask preserves frozen baseline logits and action selection
